keywords.name: transport_energy_integration
keywords.query: ("electric vehicle*" OR "electric bus*" OR "battery electric bus*" OR "charging infrastructure" OR "wireless charging") AND ("power grid" OR "smart grid" OR "demand response" OR "energy system*" OR "renewable energy") AND ("optimization" OR "planning" OR "scheduling" OR "operation*")

keywords.name: transport_emergency_resilience
keywords.query: ("transportation resilience" OR "public transport disruption" OR "transit disruption" OR "emergency transportation" OR "disruption management") AND ("public transport" OR "transit" OR "bus" OR "multimodal" OR "shared mobility") AND ("optimization" OR "scheduling" OR "planning" OR "routing" OR "resource allocation")

keywords.name: or_ai
keywords.query: ("predict-then-optimize" OR "decision-focused learning" OR "learning to optimize" OR "machine learning for optimization" OR "learning-augmented optimization") AND ("mixed integer programming" OR "combinatorial optimization" OR "stochastic programming" OR "Benders decomposition" OR "operations research")

keywords.name: ai_behavior
keywords.query: ("machine learning" OR "artificial intelligence" OR "large language model*" OR "deep learning") AND ("travel behavior" OR "traveler behavior" OR "choice modeling" OR "mode choice" OR "discrete choice" OR "passenger behavior") AND ("transportation" OR "mobility" OR "airport" OR "transit")

topJournals: Transportation Research Part A: Policy and Practice
Transportation Research Part C: Emerging Technologies
Transportation Research Part D: Transport and Environment
Transportation Research Part E: Logistics and Transportation Review
